assessment.note: He explicitly doubts whether recognized work matches what he is doing, a strong clarity misalignment signal; [THREAD-DEFERRED] 'the work that gets recognized' merits follow-up next session.

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
new_queue.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

new_queue.label: Path forward
new_queue.name: What concrete path do you think exists for you from here?
new_queue.description: Invites his own read on the next step and whether he sees a real trajectory.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What support from me would make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes by identifying concrete support without opening a new topic.
